title: Lab 32: SSH Key Authentication
description: Configure passwordless SSH login from client to server using a key pair

tasks: Create user relay32 on client and user vault32 on server. Set the password of both users to cinder9.
Configure key-based SSH authentication so that user relay32 on client can log in to vault32@server without a password prompt.
Do not disable PasswordAuthentication globally for this task.
hints: Generate the key as the source user.
Populate authorized_keys for the target user.
checks: getent passwd relay32 >/dev/null && getent shadow relay32 | awk -F: 'length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/' >/dev/null
runuser -l relay32 -c 'ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes vault32@server true'
